one_time_description: Unrealized gain on portfolio investments in Bevcanna Enterprises Inc. shares purchased at $0.25/share, valued at $1.00/share at year-end
economic_notes: First Nation has investments in multiple partnerships and business enterprises including Tallcree Wildland Limited Partnership (firefighting), Netaskinan Development Limited Partnership (forestry/timber royalties), Netaskinan Contracting Limited Partnership (contract work), Tipeemso Development Limited Partnership (property development), and 2133182 Alberta Ltd. Bevcanna Enterprises Inc. shares (1,000,000 shares) purchased Oct 2020; market value dropped to $90,000 by June 8, 2022 subsequent to year-end.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to scope limitation on 2133182 AB Ltd. — auditors could not obtain sufficient evidence for this business entity which recorded $297,195 in revenue from government business enterprises. First Nation uses modified equity method for GBEs and partnerships. Funds held in trust of $8,641,216 are held by Government of Canada and Bank of Montreal on behalf of members. Term loans due on demand of $3,626,299 exist. Bevcanna Enterprises investment of $1,000,000 at year-end had declined to $90,000 by audit date (June 8, 2022), representing a subsequent event unrealized loss of $910,000. Long-term debt of $166,066 from prior year was transferred to Netaskinan Contracting LP on a non-cash basis. Prior year expenses not separately disclosed as a total in the comparative statement; prior_expenses set to 0. Annual debt service calculated from repayment of long-term debt ($49,090) and repayment of term loans due on demand ($39,144) = $88,234.
